name: Access Panels using CAPL Functions
title: Access Panels using CAPL Functions
intro: You can access panels or panel elements using following CAPL functions.
Opens a panel or all panels.
Closes a panel or all panels.
Resets the Clock Control designed as stop watch.
Starts the Clock Control designed as stop watch.
Stops the Clock Control designed as stop watch.
Deletes the contents of the CAPL Output View.
Button; Check Box; Combo Box; Hex/Text Editor; Input/Output Box; MOST Send Button; Numeric Up/Down; Panel Control Button; Path Dialog; Radio Button; Switch/Indicator; Track Bar
Transfers defined values to the symbol assigned to the control.

Analog Gauge, Button, Check Box, Clock Control, Combo Box, Hex/Text Editor, Input/Output Box, LCD Control, Media Player, Meter, Numeric Up/Down, Path Dialog, Progress Bar, Radio Button, Switch/Indicator, Track Bar
Transfers defined values to the control.

Since CANalyzer version 7.5 for the putValueToControl function additional parameters can be set to change the format of the output, e.g. the text should be displayed in a new paragraph or the value should be displayed hexadecimal.
Sets the time of the Clock Control.
Sets the background color of panel elements. The color value is determined using the MakeRGB function.

Analog Gauge, Check Box, Clinometer, Clock Control, Combo Box, Compass, Group Box, Hex/Text Editor, Input/Output Box, LCD Control, Meter, MOST Send Button, Numeric Up/Down, Panel Control Button, Radio Button, Static Text, Track Bar
Sets the background and text color of panel elements.

Analog Gauge, Button, CAPL Output View, Check Box, Clock Control, Combo Box, Hex/Text Editor, Input/Output Box, LCD Control, MOST Send Button, Numeric Up/Down, Panel Control Button, Radio Button, Static Text
Sets the foreground color of panel elements. The color value is determined using the MakeRGB function.

Analog Gauge, Button, CAPL Output View, Check Box, Clock Control, Combo Box, Compass, Hex/Text Editor, Input/Output Box, LCD Control, LED Band, LED Control, MOST Send Button, Numeric Up/Down, Panel Control Button, Radio Button, Static Text
Sets back the background and text color of panel elements as defined in the Panel Designer.

Analog Gauge, Button, CAPL Output View, Check Box, Clock Control, Combo Box, Group Box, Hex/Text Editor, Input/Output Box, LCD Control, Meter, MOST Send Button, Numeric Up/Down, Panel Control Button, Radio Button, Static Text, Track Bar
Replaces the media file of the Media Player.
Replaces the image of the Picture Box.
